sourcePrompt: A firebase guard tower about eight meters tall. Four heavy timber legs lean inward, laced with diagonal cross-bracing; a ladder climbs one face to a square observation platform with a waist-high sandbag wall and a simple corrugated-tin shade roof on corner posts. Rough-cut timber, sandbags and rusty tin, narrow and watchful. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
